case_title: AMANDA ARROSPIDE VS. COREY S MAAS

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 40.00 - SERVED JUL-02-2018, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT MAAS, COREY S

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ARROSPIDE, AMANDA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT MAAS, COREY S PLAINTIFF'S TESTIMONY ESTABLISHES THAT SHE DISCOVERED THE PROBLEMS SHE CLAIMS BEFORE JUNE 26, 2017. THE ONE-YEAR STATUE OF LIMITATIONS (C.C.P. 340.5) BARS THIS ACTION. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING (REQUEST FORWARDED TO DEPT 506 FOR JUDICIAL REVIEW & SIGNATURE.) FILED BY DEFENDANT MAAS, COREY S
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-19-2018 - JUDGMENT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY ARROSPIDE, AMANDA AS TO DEFENDANT MAAS, COREY S ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-17-2018 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED DEC-03-2018 ORDERED DESTROYED
ORDER ON REQUEST TO POSTPONE THE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING. THE REQUEST IS GRANTED.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-17-2018 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO SEP-19-2018 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-19-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-19-2018 BY CHRISTINE VAN AKEN. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT AND ASSISTED BY SPANISH INTERPRETER, MARGO SEELY. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: J. BERTELSEN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
EXHIBITS RETURNED TO PLAINTIFF ARROSPIDE, AMANDA ADDITIONAL DEFENDANT EXHIBITS
